migration_blockers.description: 72h stability soak window opened 2026-05-22; gate assessment requires soak completion evidence and operator T0 baseline capture (Task 2 — admin dashboard action)
migration_blockers.validation_action: Operator must capture T0 baseline in admin soak workspace; gate requires 72h of engine-run evidence, 0 errors, candle accumulation across all watchlist symbols

migration_blockers.description: NAS100/US30 EA Properties config — trader must update MT5 EA Symbols input list to include NAS100 and US30 broker alias names. No code blocker.
migration_blockers.validation_action: Trader updates Symbols= input in MT5 EA Properties. Backend symbol alias mapping (NASDAQ→NAS100, WALLSTREET→US30) already in place.

migration_blockers.description: Weekend freeze / disconnect behaviour observation (Task 9) — passive soak window covers Sat 2026-05-23 to Sun 2026-05-25. No code change required.
migration_blockers.validation_action: Observe smc_sf_snapshots.state per symbol during weekend hours and confirm EA resumes on Sunday open (~22:00 UTC)

ea_route_auth.details: permission_ea_market_stream → permission_ea_bridge: X-EA-API-Key header required, hash_equals() comparison, unconfigured key → 503, invalid key → 403, missing user_id → 400, invalid user_id → 403, wp_set_current_user() called

ea_payload_validation.details: symbol required (map_symbol_aliases), timeframe normalized, quote_time/timestamp staleness guard (>300s → 422), bid/ask is_finite + >0 + bid≤ask, OHLC high≥max(O,C) + low≤min(O,C), candle epoch guard (pre-2000 rejected), candle staleness (>180s at insert_mt5_candle), tick_volume clamped ≥0

authority_diagnostics_protection.details: GET /sniper/v1/authority-diagnostics uses permission_user → 401 for unauthenticated requests. Not exposed publicly. Confirmed.

admin_route_protection.details: All /admin/* routes use permission_admin (manage_options capability). 401 for unauthenticated, 403 for non-admin.

frontend_freshness_truth.details: FreshnessBadge renders backend state prop directly. useStreamingTicks interpolates intermediate ticks for UI feel but final sub-tick snaps to exact backend target — does not fabricate live status. VerdictBadge renders backend verdict prop.

signal_engine_stale_guard.details: ensure_engine_snapshot() checks price freshness via staleThresholdSec, is_equity_index_off_session() correctly gates NAS100/US30 off-hours, is_chart_candle_fresh() validates candle age with 2h-4h threshold window.

symbol_alias_mapping.details: map_symbol_aliases(): GOLD→XAUUSD, SILVER→XAGUSD, NASDAQ/NASDAQ100/USTECH100/USTECH→NAS100, WALLSTREET/WALLSTREET30/DOW30/DJ30→US30. EA SymbolNormalizer.mqh also handles broker aliases on MT5 side.

dashboard_data_flow.details: sniperClient.ts call() attaches Authorization or X-WP-Nonce headers for authenticated endpoints. age_sec is populated from backend quote_time, not fetch time. useSnapshot() gated on backendReady && pollMs !== null.

ea_duplicate_routes.details: No duplicate ea/market-stream route found. Single registration at line 683.
